mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0106-02#Sql004 */ A.TORIKESHI_KBN AS TORIKESHI_KBN, A.KOUSOKU_KBN AS KOUSOKU_KBN, A.KOUSOKU_SYUBETU AS KOUSOKU_SYUBETU, TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.NISA_KINGAKU,'999,999,999,999,990')) AS NISA_KINGAKU, A.TOKUTEI_AZUKARI_BAIBAI_KBN AS TOKUTEI_AZUKARI_BAIBAI_KBN, TRIM(A.HATTYU_RIYU) AS HATTYU_RIYU, TO_CHAR(A.TOUROKU_NICHIJI, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TOUROKU_NICHIJI, TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.SEISAN_KINGAKU,'999,999,999,999,990')) AS SEISAN_KINGAKU, A.TRAN_ID AS TRAN_ID, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM TB_ADDITIONAL_ORDER_IFA A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(A.TOUROKU_NICHIJI, 'YYYY/MM/DD') = #{req.recordDate} AND A.USER_ID = #{req.createUser} AND A.HATTYUU_KBN = '3' AND A.EDABAN = '1' AND A.KOKYAKU_ID = #{req.customerId} AND A.STS_CD = '1' ORDER BY A.TOUROKU_NICHIJI DESC FETCH FIRST 99 ROWS ONLY

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0106-02#Sql005 */ A.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, A.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO AS IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, A.BRAND_CODE AS BRAND_CODE, A.BRAND_NAME AS BRAND_NAME, A.METHOD_TYPE AS METHOD_TYPE, A.TRADE_TYPE AS TRADE_TYPE, TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.ORDER_QUANTITY,'9,999,999,999,990')) AS ORDER_QUANTITY, A.TRADE_METHOD_TYPE AS TRADE_METHOD_TYPE, TRIM(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM('0' FROM TO_CHAR(NVL(A.LIMIT_PRICE,'0'),'999,999,990.99999999')))) AS LIMIT_PRICE, TRIM(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM('0' FROM TO_CHAR(NVL(A.STOP_PRICE,'0'),'999,999,990.99999999')))) AS STOP_PRICE, A.CURRENCY_CODE AS CURRENCY_CODE, A.SETTLEMENT_TYPE AS SETTLEMENT_TYPE, A.DEPOSIT_TYPE AS DEPOSIT_TYPE, A.ORDER_TYPE AS ORDER_TYPE, A.CREATE_TIME AS CREATE_TIME, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM ( SELECT FCO.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, FCO.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO AS IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, FCO.BRAND_CODE AS BRAND_CODE, FCO.BRAND_NAME AS BRAND_NAME, FCO.METHOD_TYPE AS METHOD_TYPE, FCO.TRADE_TYPE AS TRADE_TYPE, FCO.ORDER_QUANTITY AS ORDER_QUANTITY, FCO.TRADE_METHOD_TYPE AS TRADE_METHOD_TYPE, FCO.LIMIT_PRICE AS LIMIT_PRICE, FCO.STOP_PRICE AS STOP_PRICE, FCO.CURRENCY_CODE AS CURRENCY_CODE, FCO.SETTLEMENT_TYPE AS SETTLEMENT_TYPE, FCO.DEPOSIT_TYPE AS DEPOSIT_TYPE, FCO.ORDER_TYPE AS ORDER_TYPE, TO_CHAR(FCO.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, FCO.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER FROM FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER FCO WHERE TO_CHAR(FCO.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD') = #{req.recordDate} AND FCO.CREATE_USER = #{req.createUser} AND FCO.METHOD_TYPE IN ('0', '10', '11') AND FCO.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO = '1' AND FCO.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND FCO.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{req.accountNumber} AND FCO.API_STATUS_CODE BETWEEN 200 AND 299 UNION ALL SELECT FCOH.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, FCOH.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO AS IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, FCOH.BRAND_CODE AS BRAND_CODE, FCOH.BRAND_NAME AS BRAND_NAME, FCOH.METHOD_TYPE AS METHOD_TYPE, FCOH.TRADE_TYPE AS TRADE_TYPE, FCOH.ORDER_QUANTITY AS ORDER_QUANTITY, FCOH.TRADE_METHOD_TYPE AS TRADE_METHOD_TYPE, FCOH.LIMIT_PRICE AS LIMIT_PRICE, FCOH.STOP_PRICE AS STOP_PRICE, FCOH.CURRENCY_CODE AS CURRENCY_CODE, FCOH.SETTLEMENT_TYPE AS SETTLEMENT_TYPE, FCOH.DEPOSIT_TYPE AS DEPOSIT_TYPE, FCOH.ORDER_TYPE AS ORDER_TYPE, TO_CHAR(FCOH.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, FCOH.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER FROM FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER_HIS FCOH WHERE TO_CHAR(FCOH.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD') = #{req.recordDate} AND FCOH.CREATE_USER = #{req.createUser} AND FCOH.METHOD_TYPE IN ('0', '10', '11') AND FCOH.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO = '1' AND FCOH.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND FCOH.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{req.accountNumber} AND FCOH.API_STATUS_CODE BETWEEN 200 AND 299 )A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.CREATE_USER = B.USER_ID ORDER BY A.CREATE_TIME DESC FETCH FIRST 99 ROWS ONLY

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0106-02#Sql006 */ A.BRAND_CODE AS BRAND_CODE, A.TRADE_TYPE AS TRADE_TYPE, TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.ORDER_COUNT,'9,999,999,999,990')) AS ORDER_COUNT, A.KESSAI_TUKA AS KESSAI_TUKA, A.DEPOSIT_TYPE AS DEPOSIT_TYPE, A.CREATE_TIME AS CREATE_TIME, A.ORDER_STATUS AS ORDER_STATUS, B.BRAND_NAME AS BRAND_NAME, NVL(C.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM ( SELECT TCO.BRAND_CODE AS BRAND_CODE, TCO.TRADE_TYPE AS TRADE_TYPE, TCO.ORDER_COUNT AS ORDER_COUNT, TCO.KESSAI_TUKA AS KESSAI_TUKA, TCO.DEPOSIT_TYPE AS DEPOSIT_TYPE, TO_CHAR(TCO.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, TCO.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER, TCO.ORDER_STATUS AS ORDER_STATUS FROM T_COUNTER_ORDER TCO WHERE TO_CHAR(TCO.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD') = #{req.recordDate} AND TCO.CREATE_USER = #{req.createUser} AND TCO.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND TCO.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{req.accountNumber} UNION ALL SELECT TCOH.BRAND_CODE AS BRAND_CODE, TCOH.TRADE_TYPE AS TRADE_TYPE, TCOH.ORDER_COUNT AS ORDER_COUNT, TCOH.KESSAI_TUKA AS KESSAI_TUKA, TCOH.DEPOSIT_TYPE AS DEPOSIT_TYPE, TO_CHAR(TCOH.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, TCOH.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER, TCOH.ORDER_STATUS AS ORDER_STATUS FROM T_COUNTER_ORDER_HIS TCOH WHERE TO_CHAR(TCOH.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD') = #{req.recordDate} AND TCOH.CREATE_USER = #{req.createUser} AND TCOH.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND TCOH.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{req.accountNumber} )A LEFT JOIN M_COUNTER_BRAND B ON A.BRAND_CODE = B.BRAND_CODE LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS C ON A.CREATE_USER = C.USER_ID ORDER BY A.CREATE_TIME DESC FETCH FIRST 99 ROWS ONLY

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0106-02#Sql007 */ A.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, A.TRADE_TYPE AS TRADE_TYPE, A.CURRENCY_CODE AS CURRENCY_CODE, A.CURRENCY_NAME AS CURRENCY_NAME, TRIM(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM('0' FROM TO_CHAR(NVL(A.FX_ORDER_AMOUNT,'0'),'999,999,999,999,999,990.9999')))) AS FX_ORDER_AMOUNT, A.FX_TRADE_SERVICE_TYPE AS FX_TRADE_SERVICE_TYPE, A.FX_ORDER_STATUS AS FX_ORDER_STATUS, A.ORDER_NO AS ORDER_NO, TRIM(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM('0' FROM TO_CHAR(NVL(A.EXCHANGE_RATE,'0'),'999,999,999,999,999,990.9999')))) AS EXCHANGE_RATE, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, A.FX_SPECIFIC_ACCOUNT_CODE AS FX_SPECIFIC_ACCOUNT_CODE, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM EXCHANGE_ORDER A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.CREATE_USER = B.USER_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD') = #{req.recordDate} AND A.CREATE_USER = #{req.createUser} AND A.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{req.accountNumber} AND A.FX_ORDER_STATUS ='0' AND A.API_STATUS_CODE IS NULL ORDER BY A.CREATE_TIME DESC FETCH FIRST 99 ROWS ONLY

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0106-02#Sql008 */ B.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, B.ORDER_TYPE AS ORDER_TYPE FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.IFA_ORDER_NO ORDER BY A.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO DESC) AS RN, A.IFA_ORDER_NO, A.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, A.ORDER_TYPE FROM ( SELECT FCO.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, FCO.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO AS IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, FCO.ORDER_TYPE AS ORDER_TYPE FROM FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER FCO WHERE FCO.API_STATUS_CODE BETWEEN 200 AND 299 UNION ALL SELECT FCOH.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, FCOH.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO AS IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, FCOH.ORDER_TYPE AS ORDER_TYPE FROM FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER_HIS FCOH WHERE FCOH.API_STATUS_CODE BETWEEN 200 AND 299 )A ) B WHERE B.RN = 1

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0106-02#Sql009 */ B.TRADE_TYPE AS TRADE_TYPE, B.CURRENCY_CODE AS CURRENCY_CODE, TRIM(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM('0' FROM TO_CHAR(NVL(B.FX_ORDER_AMOUNT,'0'),'999,999,999,999,999,990.9999')))) AS FX_ORDER_AMOUNT, B.FX_SPECIFIC_ACCOUNT_CODE AS FX_SPECIFIC_ACCOUNT_CODE, B.ORDER_NO AS ORDER_NO, B.FX_ORDER_STATUS AS FX_ORDER_STATUS FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.TRADE_TYPE,A.CURRENCY_CODE,A.FX_ORDER_AMOUNT,A.FX_SPECIFIC_ACCOUNT_CODE,A.ORDER_NO ORDER BY A.IFA_ORDER_NO DESC) AS RN, A.TRADE_TYPE, A.CURRENCY_CODE, A.FX_ORDER_AMOUNT, A.FX_SPECIFIC_ACCOUNT_CODE, A.ORDER_NO, A.FX_ORDER_STATUS FROM EXCHANGE_ORDER A WHERE A.API_STATUS_CODE IS NULL ) B WHERE B.RN = 1

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0106-02#Sql010 */ B.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, B.ORDER_STATUS AS ORDER_STATUS, B.PRE_ORDER_STATUS AS PRE_ORDER_STATUS FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.IFA_ORDER_NO ORDER BY A.IFA_ORDER_NO DESC, A.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO DESC) AS RN, LEAD(A.ORDER_STATUS,1)OVER(PARTITION BY A.IFA_ORDER_NO ORDER BY A.IFA_ORDER_NO DESC, A.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO DESC) AS PRE_ORDER_STATUS, A.IFA_ORDER_NO, A.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, A.ORDER_STATUS FROM T_JP_ORDER A WHERE (TRIM(A.SHUBETU) IS NULL AND A.SHUBETU IS NOT NULL) OR (TRIM(A.SHUBETU) = 'APL' AND A.CODE LIKE 'W%') ) B WHERE B.RN = 1

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0106-02#Sql011 */ B.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, B.ORDER_STATUS AS ORDER_STATUS FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.IFA_ORDER_NO ORDER BY A.IFA_ORDER_NO DESC, A.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO DESC) AS RN, A.IFA_ORDER_NO, A.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, A.ORDER_STATUS FROM JP_TOUSHIN_ORDER A WHERE (TRIM(A.SHUBETU) IS NULL AND A.SHUBETU IS NOT NULL) OR (TRIM(A.SHUBETU) = 'APL' AND A.CODE LIKE 'W%') ) B WHERE B.RN = 1

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0106-02#Sql012 */ B.TRAN_ID AS TRAN_ID, B.TORIKESHI_KBN AS TORIKESHI_KBN FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.TRAN_ID ORDER BY A.EDABAN DESC ) AS RN, A.TRAN_ID, A.EDABAN, A.TORIKESHI_KBN AS TORIKESHI_KBN FROM TB_ADDITIONAL_ORDER_IFA A WHERE A.STS_CD = '1' ) B WHERE B.RN = 1
